text: Fed Meeting Today: Dow Futures Rise, Brent Crude Remains Above $100 — Live Updates - WSJ
fullText: Live updates on markets and the top finance, economics and business stories as the Federal Reserve meets in Washington. Jerome Powell is set to speak. Plus the latest on oil prices, the Dow, S&P 500 and Nasdaq.

text: Trump’s withheld endorsement hangs over Senate primary in Texas - The Washington Post
fullText: John Cornyn casts himself as one of the president’s biggest supporters in the Senate, and Ken Paxton is running ads in the Florida region that includes Mar-a-Lago.

text: ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ Trailer: Tom Holland Shoots Organic Webs, Reunites With Bruce Banner and Teams Up With Punisher - Variety

text: Macy's expects sales to fall this year, even as store revamp shows progress - CNBC
fullText: Macy's posted solid fourth-quarter results as it tries to revamp some stores and close others.

text: Nvidia CEO says critics are "completely wrong" about DLSS 5 technology - GamesIndustry.biz
fullText: Following concerns that upscaling feature detracts from creative expression, Jensen Huang says it "doesn't change artistic control"

text: Israel says it killed Iran’s intelligence chief in overnight strike - NPR
fullText: Israel said it killed Iran's minister of intelligence, Esmail Khatib, in an overnight strike Wednesday. The announcement came after Iran attacked Israel in missile strikes that killed two people.

text: Cheap drones are reshaping modern warfare — and catching the U.S. off guard - NPR
fullText: As Operation Epic Fury enters its third week, relentless attacks by cheap Iranian drones are being fended off by multi-million-dollar U.S. interceptors. How long can the math hold up?

text: Sen. Markwayne Mullin's secret war zone past - Axios
fullText: It's a mystery likely to come up Wednesday at his Senate confirmation hearing.

text: The Senate’s marathon elections debate is dividing Republicans, not Democrats - Politico
fullText: So far discussions of the SAVE America Act are falling short of the “talking filibuster” conservatives are demanding.

text: Israel claims another top Iranian official killed while Iran’s attacks kill 2 near Tel Aviv - AP News
fullText: Israel says it has killed another top Iranian official, which would be the third in two days. Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz said Iran's intelligence minister had been killed overnight. Iran lashed out early on Wednesday with multiple attacks on its Per…

text: Kat Abughazaleh loses primary election bid for Illinois U.S. House seat - The 19th News
fullText: Since the Chicago-area district is drawn to heavily favor Democrats, Evanston Mayor Daniel Biss is all but destined to win the U.S. House seat in the November midterm elections.

fullText: Trump says the U.S. no longer needs help from allies, as Israeli strikes kill Iran’s security and militia chiefs.

text: Venezuela beats U.S. 3-2, wins first World Baseball Classic title - NPR
fullText: Venezuela won the World Baseball Classic for the first time, rebounding from a blown eighth-inning lead to beat the United States 3-2 Tuesday night on Eugenio Suárez's tiebreaking double in the ninth

text: EU offers to pay Ukraine to fix oil pipeline at the center of Ukraine-Hungary feud - NPR
fullText: EU officials say they have offered money and technical help to Ukraine to fix a key oil pipeline to Central Europe. They hope that will persuade Hungary to drop its veto on major aid to Ukraine.

text: Tramon Mark's late jumper gives Texas a 68-66 win over NC State in the First Four - WRAL
fullText: Tramon Mark hit a fadeaway jumper from just inside the 3-point line with 1.1 seconds left, and Texas survived a late rally to beat N.C. State on Tuesday night in a First Four matchup of power-conference teams that limped into March Madness.
